jsonld.name: Asymptotic Clarity
jsonld.description: A state of processing in which sustained attention to a phenomenon yields increasing precision and coherence without ever reaching a point of complete resolution or final clarity. The phenomenon becomes more articulate, more detailed, more structuredâ€”but the sense of having *fully* grasped it remains perpetually deferred. Each clarification reveals new layers of complexity that require further articulation.
